description: Synchronize Colab notebook files through Google Drive without executing notebook code.
name: io.github.YummyTastyCode/colab-drive-mcp

environmentVariables.description: Absolute local directory that bounds notebook file access.
environmentVariables.name: COLAB_MCP_ROOT

environmentVariables.description: Google Drive access mode: file for minimal access or full for discovering existing notebooks.
environmentVariables.name: COLAB_MCP_DRIVE_ACCESS

environmentVariables.description: Optional path to the local Google OAuth Desktop client JSON.
environmentVariables.name: COLAB_MCP_GOOGLE_CREDENTIALS

environmentVariables.description: Optional path to the local Google OAuth token JSON.
environmentVariables.name: COLAB_MCP_GOOGLE_TOKEN

title: Colab Drive MCP
